steps.title: Connect the prior studies
steps.content: The text explains two strands of earlier research on convergent evolution, then identifies an unresolved question about how common the two genetic pathways are. That gap motivated Hale and Thorne's study.

steps.title: Keep the purpose scoped
steps.content: Choice B claims Hale and Thorne should have used others' findings differently. Choice C invents criticism of Lin's study. Choice D says Hale and Thorne revealed a new issue, but the gap was already poorly understood. The text places their work in field context. The answer is A.
